headline: The Single Biggest Reason to Buy Celestica Ahead of July 27 Q2 Earnings
summary: Celestica is reporting Q2 earnings on July 27, and the setup heading into that print raises a question most investors have not asked yet: what happens when a pick-and-shovel AI play trades at a discount to its own growth rate with 20 of 21 analysts already bullish?
